name: my-qwik-empty-starter
engines-annotation: Mostly required by sharp which needs a Node-API v9 compatible runtime

scripts.deploy: echo 'Run "npm run qwik add" to install a server adapter'
scripts.preview: npm run sync:stencil-esm && qwik build preview && vite preview --open --port 4173 --strictPort
scripts.sync:stencil-esm: node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; import path from 'node:path'; const src = path.resolve('../stencil-js-lib/dist/esm'); const dest = path.resolve('public/stencil/esm'); fs.rmSync(dest, { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.mkdirSync(dest, { recursive: true }); fs.cpSync(src, dest, { recursive: true }); console.log('Synced', src, '->', dest);"
